title: Core Architectural Models in Cloud Computing
description: A flowchart showing the primary architectural models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) and their relationship to user responsibility and vendor-managed services.
relationships: The Cloud Vendor provides increasing levels of managed service from IaaS to SaaS
The Application User/Developer manages less of the stack from On-Premises to SaaS
IaaS provides virtualized infrastructure, PaaS provides a development platform, and SaaS provides a complete application
